name: chat-short
description: Interactive chat baseline: short prompts, short completions, steady open-loop arrivals. The reference point every other workload is contrasted against. Output length is directed via max_tokens and capped at 384 tokens (lognormal body, median ~120) so runs are comparable and decode time is bounded. Canonical suite v1 (IB-T003); results are comparable only across identical workload version + seed.
